title: Don't Build Your Own AI Inference! It's Too Expensive & Risky! #shorts
summary: Cyril Imhof argues that building independent AI inference infrastructure is prohibitively expensive and risky due to high costs and potential financial exposure from pivots. The advice is to rely on established service providers instead.
writeup: This short from Cyril Imhof argues against building independent AI inference infrastructure, citing prohibitively high costs and the financial exposure that comes from later pivots. The recommendation is to depend on established service providers rather than standing up local inference in-house. The takeaway: self-hosted inference carries expense and risk that outsourcing to existing providers avoids.
